commands.summary: Full repository suite passed with 568 tests, including nine vocabulary-module tests and five new outcome fixtures (no-git unverifiable, drift-with-git stale, current-repository verified_current, mixed-case rollup to stale, registry missing-target stale).
Repository audit returned ok true with verification_outcome verified_current after the index rebuild committed at bfaf694.

commands.command: python -m pytest (independent clone of github.com/MustafaAksu/ai-lab at bfaf694)
commands.summary: Cross-environment verification: the pushed commit reproduced 568 passing tests and an ok true, verified_current audit in a separate sandbox environment.

summary: Verified completion of PLAN-20260719-0001 at commits 71abadc (shared verification-outcome vocabulary module with nine focused tests) and bfaf694 (classified index and registry audits, outcome fixtures, documentation). The full suite passes with 568 tests; the repository audit reports ok true and verification_outcome verified_current; the no-git zip-export fixture reports unverifiable with warn severity, evidence_status no_git_dir, and zero error findings; the drift-with-git fixture reports stale with an error-severity drift-classified content-stale finding; the mixed drift-plus-evidence-unavailable fixture rolls up to stale; the registry audit adopts the shared vocabulary with drift-only findings. The reviewer-added success criterion requiring a registry-audit no-git unverifiable fixture is recorded as justified inapplicability: audit_self_model_registry performs no git-evidence verification, so unverifiable is correctly unreachable, documented in docs/self_model/VERIFICATION_OUTCOMES.md. Removal of the dead shadowed duplicate definition of audit_self_model_index is recorded as legitimate incidental work with behavior unchanged. COMP-0030 records unanimous provider adjudication of both points and a complete-and-keep-gap-open recommendation. Independent cross-verification: the pushed commit was pulled from the public GitHub repository into a separate environment where the full suite and audit reproduced identical results.
